MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Cometria Cooper, Esq., specially aappearing for Plaintiff, CAN CAPITAL ASSET SERVICING, INC., fka NEWLOGIC BUSINESS LOANS, INC.
Court granted Plaintiff's Oral motion for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AARON L. SHORB.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $126,823.70
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,262.75
Attorney's Fees: $2,258.75
Costs: $538.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $136,884.10
Judgment signed in open court.
